case_title: GAYNELL ARMSTRONG-MCCURN ET AL VS. CALIFORNIA PARKING

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (AGENT FOR SERVICE:RICHARD PUCCINELLI) - SEE SIGNATURE - SERVED AUG-19-2014, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA PARKING
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA PARKING

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-30-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-30-2014 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT EXCEPT PLAINTIFF ROBERT MCCURN WHO WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY ROBERT PUCCINELLI--VALET MANAGER. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-30-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARMSTRONG-MCCURN, GAYNELL MCCURN, ROBERT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA PARKING $850.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $915.00, PLAINTIFF ESTABLISHED THAT SOME, BUT NOT ALL OF HER ITEMIZED DAMAGES WERE CAUSED BY DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-02-2015 ORDERED DESTROYED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,214.11 FILED BY ARMSTRONG-MCCURN, GAYNELL MCCURN, ROBERT AS TO DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA PARKING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-30-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS:RICHARD PUCCINELLI) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARMSTRONG-MCCURN, GAYNELL MCCURN, ROBERT AS TO DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA PARKING
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE DAVID LAVINE. FILED BY ARMSTRONG-MCCURN, GAYNELL CALIFORNIA PARKING
